ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., 1,1,2-TRICHLOROETHANE) */,
  "pollutant_type" TEXT /* Type of pollutant (e.g., particulate matter, gases) */,
  "safe_threshold" REAL /* Safe concentration threshold for the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Potential health impacts of the pollutant */,
  "regulatory_standard" TEXT /* Reference to the relevant environmental regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county (e.g., Adams) */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "primary_sources" TEXT /* Primary sources of pollution in the county (e.g., industrial, vehicular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutant_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the measurement was taken */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Concentration value of the pollutant */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was recorded */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., sensor, laboratory) */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the county where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement (e.g., GC-MS, colorimetric) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Indicator of the measurement's quality (e.g., valid, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_measurements_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_measurements_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policy maker, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for emergency contacts */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions or access levels (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., exceedance, maintenance) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES pollutant_measurements ("measurement_id")
)
